title: Moderation Update - April 19, 2026
body:
Community Moderation Actions Taken:

• Banned 2 users for severe violations:
  - spam_wave_42: Phishing links across 6 channels
  - toxic_runner: Targeted harassment of newcomers

• Closed 1 false-positive report (core_maintainer — brigading incident)

• 3 lower-severity reports remain open for review

We take community safety seriously. Reports are triaged by severity and validated before action. If you see something concerning, please report it.

— Community Operations
